sections.paragraph:
Original: יתניאל

Transliteration: yathnı̂y'êl

Phonetic: yath-nee-ale'

BDB Definition:

Jathniel = "God hires me"
  1. a Korhite Levite and the 4th of the family of Meshelemiah

Origin: from an unused root meaning to endure, and H410

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
